architectureDecision.label: Shipping + release PRs
architectureDecision.rationale: Full parity on release/**, tags, release-readiness dispatch, publish, and pull_request targeting release/**; not on ordinary main pushes.

readyReview.decision: Full parity on shipping contexts plus PRs to release/**; maintainer policy approval recorded on this task note.

policyApprovalRecord.topic: move full parity off ordinary main pushes

technicalBreakdown: Update ci.yml triggers/if so full parity runs only on shipping contexts and PRs to release/**.
Record maintainer approval (approver, date, rationale) on T100567 before merging policy change.
Update branch protection docs in lockstep with two-phase ci-result cutover.
Verify ordinary main evidence/status pushes skip full parity.

acceptanceCriteria: Ordinary main pushes skip full parity unless code/release context requires it.
release/**, tags, release-readiness dispatch, publish, and PRs targeting release/** run full parity.
Maintainer approval for parity policy change is recorded on task T100567 notes/metadata.
Branch protection documentation matches final required checks.
